action: Generate a realistic AI video for each genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather) using the assigned avatar and generated narration script.
fallback_action: If video generation fails, retry video generation up to 3 times; if still unsuccessful, prompt the user for further action or consider alternate means of delivering the news update.

recipe.steps: For each genre, collect the corresponding narration script and the assigned avatar ID previously mapped.
Use the video generation tool to create one realistic AI video per genre by supplying the avatar and its corresponding script.
